entry.data:
CLOUDY THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTHEAST AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF RAIN SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 20S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 20

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 40S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
